title: The Terris Steward
description: Sazed arrives at Lord Renoux's estate in Fellise to serve as Vin's tutor, teaching her the ways of nobility while secretly preserving ancient religions.

title: The Warehouse Rally
description: Sazed attends the secret warehouse rally alongside Kelsier and Vin, observing as the Survivor preaches revolution to the gathered skaa workers.

title: Guardian at the Ball
description: Sazed accompanies Vin to her first ball at Keep Venture as her steward, watching over her while she infiltrates noble society.

title: Debriefing at Fellise
description: Sazed returns to Lord Renoux's estate in Fellise with Vin and Kelsier, reviewing the results of Vin's first ball and planning next steps.

title: Saving Vin
description: Sazed takes Vin to Clubs' shop to save her and perform surgery after her injury at Kredik Shaw. He also examines a book written in Khlenni (the Lord Ruler's language) recovered during the scouting mission.

title: Return to Fellise
description: After stabilizing Vin at Clubs' shop, Sazed returns to the Renoux estate in Fellise.

title: Translating the Khlenni Book
description: At the Renoux estate library in Fellise, Sazed works to translate the book written in Khlenni that Vin recovered during the scouting mission to Kredik Shaw.

title: Guardian at Keep Elariel
description: Sazed accompanies Vin to the ball at Keep Elariel as her Terris steward, watching over her while she navigates the noble court.

title: The Scholar's Work
description: Sazed teaches Vin between balls at the Renoux estate, sharing his vast knowledge of religions while studying the patterns of the Final Empire.

title: Witness to Revolution
description: Sazed is in Luthadel during the revolution, watching as the skaa rise and Kelsier falls in Fountain Square.

title: The Fall of the Empire
description: Sazed assists the crew in the assault on Kredik Shaw, using his Feruchemy to fight through the Lord Ruler's guards.

title: A New Beginning
description: In the aftermath, Sazed begins studying Kredik Shaw's records, searching for answers about the Deepness and the Hero of Ages prophecy.

title: The Traveling Teacher
description: Sazed travels through the Eastern Dominance, visiting rural villages to share suppressed religions and knowledge with the newly freed skaa.

title: The Conventical of Seran
description: Guided by Marsh, Sazed discovers the Conventical of Seran—a horrifying Inquisitor stronghold where he finds Kwaan's steel inscription plate.

title: Deciphering the Plate
description: Sazed studies Kwaan's inscription in the Conventical, uncovering the Terris Keeper's desperate warning that the Hero of Ages prophecy was altered.

title: The Mist Killings
description: Returning westward through Urbene, Sazed encounters villages where people have mysteriously died in the mists—the first signs of the mist sickness.

title: Return to Luthadel
description: Sazed arrives at Luthadel bearing grave news about the altered prophecy, the mist killings, and the steel inscription's true meaning.

title: Debating the Prophecy
description: Sazed works with Tindwyl at Keep Venture, comparing the original and altered versions of the Hero of Ages prophecy, growing closer to her.

title: Defending the Gate
description: When koloss breach Luthadel's walls, Sazed uses his Feruchemy to hold Tin Gate single-handedly, burning through his stored attributes in a desperate last stand.

title: Fighting Marsh
description: Sazed battles a Ruin-controlled Marsh in the corridors of Kredik Shaw, barely surviving the Inquisitor's assault while Vin descends to the Well.

title: Tindwyl's Death
description: Sazed discovers that Tindwyl was killed during the koloss attack. Devastated, he begins his crisis of faith, questioning every religion he carries.

title: Southern Diplomacy
description: Sazed visits Lekal City with Breeze to negotiate a treaty, using diplomacy to bring the southern king into Elend's growing coalition.

title: Heading North
description: Sazed receives his assignment to secure Urteau through diplomacy while Elend takes the army west. He departs through the northern gate.

title: Arriving in Urteau
description: Sazed arrives in Urteau to find it under the Citizen Quellion's oppressive rule, establishing a diplomatic enclave at the abandoned Venture estate.

title: Building Trust
description: Sazed works to build trust with Urteau's population while studying the city's history and searching for the storage cavern beneath the ministry building.

title: The Ministry Investigation
description: Sazed investigates the Ministry Canton, working to access the storage cavern beneath it while navigating Quellion's paranoid government.

title: The Cavern Discovery
description: Sazed discovers the mechanism to flood the dry canal system—the Lord Ruler had drained the canals to hide the water in the storage cavern below.

title: Saving Urteau
description: As fires rage through the city during the revolution against Quellion, Sazed releases the stored water to flood the canals, saving Urteau from destruction.

title: Rebuilding
description: With Quellion deposed and the fires extinguished, Sazed helps rebuild Urteau, distributing supplies from the cache while studying the Lord Ruler's message.

title: Journey to Hathsin
description: Sazed travels to the Pits of Hathsin, drawn by the convergence of events. His study of religions and Kwaan's inscription has led him to a terrible revelation.

title: The Final Gathering
description: Sazed returns to Luthadel as the world dies around him, the ash falling in black curtains. He carries the knowledge of every religion and every prophecy.

title: The Hero of Ages
description: With Vin and Ruin both destroyed, Sazed realizes he is the Hero of Ages. He takes up both Preservation and Ruin's power at the Well of Ascension.

title: Harmony
description: Sazed ascends as Harmony, combining Ruin and Preservation. He remakes the world—moving the planet, restoring the green, and healing a thousand years of damage.
